description_long: This is a modern, minimalist chaise with a rectangular seat and a straight, medium-height backrest. The upholstery is a solid, dark gray fabric with a subtle, uniform texture, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The chaise sits on four slender, straight legs, likely made of metal, which are evenly spaced at the corners and finished in a dark color. The seat and backrest are both flat and unsegmented, with no visible buttons, tufting, or decorative elements. There are no armrests, emphasizing the streamlined silhouette and maximizing the usable seating area. The overall design is functional and understated, suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A sleek, dark gray chaise with a straight backrest, no armrests, and four slim, dark legs. The upholstery is solid and smooth, giving it a modern, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, rectangular seat and straight backrest, with no armrests and all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chaise's depth, the straight backrest, and the slim profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest and the simple, unadorned back surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the chaise's depth and the straight, unembellished backrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium-height, and unsegmented, with a flat surface and no visible decorative elements or curvature. It is fully upholstered in the same solid dark gray fabric as the seat.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and likely made of metal, finished in a dark color with a simple, modern design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid, dark gray fabric with a smooth, uniform texture and no visible pattern, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous seat cushion integrated with the frame and a matching backrest cushion, both attached and unsegmented, with no loose or layered cushions visible.
